title: Open EEG Bench: Benchmarking parameter-efficient fine-tuning of EEG foundation models
description: Open EEG Bench is a Python library for evaluating EEG foundation models across 12 pre-windowed neuroscience datasets and 8 fine-tuning strategies (frozen linear probing, ridge probing, LoRA, IA3, AdaLoRA, DoRA, OFT, full fine-tuning, and two-stage training). A single benchmark() call produces a comparable, reproducible evaluation suitable for local or SLURM-cluster execution.
